allow: Bash(sleep 3 && curl -s http://127.0.0.1:4310/health && echo "" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://127.0.0.1:4174)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:4310/search -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"query":"blue velvet sofa","max_vendors":4,"per_vendor":2,"discovery_timeout_ms":12000,"allow_seed_results":true}' 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f'Total: {d[\\"total\\"]} products'\)
print\(f'Result mode: {d.get\(\\"result_mode\\",\\"?\\"\)}'\)
diag=d.get\('diagnostics',{}\)
print\(f'Discovered: {diag.get\(\\"discovered_count\\",0\)}, Verified: {diag.get\(\\"verified_result_count\\",0\)}, Vendors: {diag.get\(\\"vendor_count\\",0\)}'\)
for p in d.get\('products',[]\)[:8]:
  img = '✓' if p.get\('image_url'\) else '✗'
  url = '✓' if p.get\('product_url'\) else '✗'
  print\(f'  [{img}img {url}url] {p[\\"vendor_name\\"]:20s} | {p[\\"product_name\\"][:50]}'\)
")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:4310/search -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"query":"swivel chairs","max_vendors":8,"per_vendor":3,"discovery_timeout_ms":10000,"allow_seed_results":true}' 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f'Total: {d[\\"total\\"]} products'\)
diag=d.get\('diagnostics',{}\)
print\(f'Discovered: {diag.get\(\\"discovered_count\\",0\)}, Verified: {diag.get\(\\"verified_result_count\\",0\)}, Vendors: {diag.get\(\\"vendor_count\\",0\)}'\)
for p in d.get\('products',[]\)[:15]:
  img = '✓' if p.get\('image_url'\) else '✗'
  url = '✓' if p.get\('product_url'\) else '✗'
  score = p.get\('relevance_score','?'\)
  print\(f'  [{img}img {url}url] score={score:>3} {p[\\"vendor_name\\"]:20s} | {p[\\"product_name\\"][:45]}'\)
")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:4310/search -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"query":"walnut dining table","max_vendors":8,"per_vendor":3,"discovery_timeout_ms":10000,"allow_seed_results":true}' 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f'Total: {d[\\"total\\"]} from {d[\\"diagnostics\\"][\\"vendor_count\\"]} vendors'\)
for p in d.get\('products',[]\)[:10]:
  img = '✓' if p.get\('image_url'\) else '✗'
  print\(f'  [{img}img] {p[\\"vendor_name\\"]:20s} | {p[\\"product_name\\"][:50]}'\)
")

Bash(node --check search-service/src/server.mjs && node --check search-service/src/lib/discover.mjs && node --check search-service/src/config/vendors.mjs && node --check search-service/src/adapters/index.mjs && node --check search-service/src/data/sample-catalog.mjs && echo "All backend syntax OK")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:4310/search -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"query":"72 inch walnut credenza","allow_seed_results":true,"search_mode":"balanced"}' | node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\)\); console.log\('AI Summary:', d.ai_summary\); console.log\('Intent:', JSON.stringify\(d.intent,null,2\)\); console.log\('Total:', d.total\); console.log\('AI parsed:', d.diagnostics?.ai_parsed\); console.log\('AI discovered:', d.diagnostics?.ai_discovered_count\); console.log\('Crawler discovered:', d.diagnostics?.crawler_discovered_count\); console.log\('First 3 products:'\); \(d.products||[]\).slice\(0,3\).forEach\(p => console.log\(' -', p.product_name, '|', p.vendor_name, '|', p.ingestion_source, '| img:', !!p.image_url, '| url:', !!p.product_url\)\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:4310/search -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"query":"MCM accent chair under 2k","allow_seed_results":true}' | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('AI Summary:', d.get\('ai_summary','\(none\)'\)\)
intent = d.get\('intent',{}\)
print\('AI parsed:', intent.get\('ai_parsed'\)\)
print\('Product type:', intent.get\('product_type'\)\)
print\('Style:', intent.get\('style'\)\)
print\('Max price:', intent.get\('max_price'\)\)
print\('Attributes:', intent.get\('attributes'\)\)
print\('Total:', d.get\('total'\)\)
diag = d.get\('diagnostics',{}\)
print\('AI discovered:', diag.get\('ai_discovered_count'\)\)
print\('Query variants:', diag.get\('query_variants'\)\)
print\('First 5 products:'\)
for p in \(d.get\('products'\) or []\)[:5]:
    print\(f'  - {p[\\"product_name\\"]} | {p[\\"vendor_name\\"]} | src:{p.get\(\\"ingestion_source\\",\\"\\"\)} | url:{bool\(p.get\(\\"product_url\\"\)\)}'\)
")
Bash(lsof -ti:4310 | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; sleep 65 && echo "cooldown done")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:4310/search -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"marble top coffee table"}' | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
prods=d.get\('products',d.get\('results',[]\)\)
print\(f'QUERY: marble top coffee table'\)
print\(f'Total results: {len\(prods\)}'\)
vendors=set\(p.get\('vendor_name','?'\) for p in prods\)
print\(f'Unique vendors: {len\(vendors\)}'\)
print\('Top 5:'\)
for p in prods[:5]:
    img='✓' if p.get\('image_url'\) else '✗'
    print\(f'  {img} {p.get\(\\"product_name\\",\\"?\\"\)[:60]} — {p.get\(\\"vendor_name\\",\\"?\\"\)} [{p.get\(\\"category\\",\\"?\\"\)}]'\)
imgs=sum\(1 for p in prods[:10] if p.get\('image_url'\)\)
print\(f'Images in top 10: {imgs}/10'\)
print\(\)
")

Bash(node -e 'const fs = require\("fs"\); const DB = "/Users/tylerhoff/Downloads/furniture-home-hub-3/search-service/data/catalog.db.json"; const data = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(DB, "utf8"\)\); const before = data.products.length; data.products = data.products.filter\(p => p.id !== "hooker_company-access-denied"\); console.log\("Removed:", before - data.products.length\); data.product_count = data.products.length; data.saved_at = new Date\(\).toISOString\(\); fs.writeFileSync\(DB, JSON.stringify\({version:1, saved_at: data.saved_at, product_count: data.product_count, products: data.products, vendor_crawl_meta: data.vendor_crawl_meta || {}}\)\); console.log\("Total:", data.products.length\);')

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:4310/catalog/stats | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); v=d['catalog']['by_vendor']; print\(f'Total: {d[\\"catalog\\"][\\"total_products\\"]}'\); [print\(f'  {k}: {v}'\) for k,v in sorted\(v.items\(\), key=lambda x:-x[1]\)]")
